prompt: Build a 5-slide IBM Carbon Design System PPTX proposing HashiCorp Professional Services for AI-driven Terraform infrastructure. Title slide with HC CY26 Kit background, a section divider, and 3 content slides covering: AI capabilities overview, implementation approach, and expected outcomes.

assertions.text: Title slide uses capture-title.mjs with HC CY26 Kit background (not programmatic fallback)
Section divider uses capture-title.mjs with --type divider
Captured title PNG is larger than 500KB
